title: Harris Ultimate Walls & Ceilings Paint Brushes | 3 Pack | 0.5", 1", 1.5"
features: Paint faster and save time with the Harris Ultimate Walls & Ceilings Flat Paint Brushes
Specifically designed for walls and ceilings, delivering the ultimate finish with emulsion paints
Ideal for painting smaller areas on walls and ceilings
Improved paint pick up compared to the Harris Essentials and Seriously Good brush ranges
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Ultimate Walls & Ceiling Flat Paint Brushes 3 Pack Contents 1 x 0.5" Brush 1 x 1" Brush 1 x 1.5" Brush For painting smaller areas on walls & celinings A step up from our Seriously Good walls and ceilings 3 brush pack, this pack contains the paint brushes you need to tackle those smaller areas of walls and ceilings. The brushes will give an ultimate finish when used with emulsion paint and feature improved paint paint pick up compared to the Harris Essentials & Seriously Good brush ranges. Doing a Painting Project Team Harris Ultimate brushes up with the Ultimate 9" Walls & Ceilings Roller set and the Ultimate 4" Walls & Ceilings Roller set Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range.
